Lirik 'Yeye Raya' - Floor 88 & Odda

(Intro)
(Verse 1)
Di rumah sebelah ada jiran macam naga
Asal nampak nak bertengkar buat aku sakit kepala
Sedap betul mulut dia senang senang panggil kita naga
Dua kali lima takut takut terkahwin pula
Tak kuasa aku,bukan dia taste saya
Jangan cakap besar takut takut terjatuh cinta

(Verse 2)
Esok dah nak raya baik buat kuih raya
Baju raya dah siap tempah, tak sabarnya nak beraya
Duit raya pun dah tukar, semangat nya nak beraya
Esok ronda-ronda boleh kita cuci mata
Semua sudah sedia elok kita tidur saja
Jangan jadi orang sebelah solat raya pun membuta
Eh dia tak puas hati apa dia sakit hati sebab tahun lepas punya baju raya sama colour dengan langsir

(Chorus)
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita semua bergembira, (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa

(Verse 3)
Perut aku pun dah kenyang, habis makan ketupat dan rendang
Tiba tiba sedara datang, minta tolong hantarkan lemang
Kenapa raya pertama,waktu ini nak rosak pula
Nak mintak tolong,tolong,tolong pada siapa
Sedihnya aku rasa beginikah kisahnya
Kenapalah raya pertama
Nasib malang bertimpa timpa

(Verse 4)
Alamak ada perempuan, dok termenung di tepi jalan
Rupa rupa jiran sebelah, sakit hati malas nak layan
Tak sampai pula hati ini,nak tinggal dia kesorangan
Awak nak pergi mana mari abang hantarkan
Malu ku selama ini,hari hari gaduh dengannya
Eh kenapa hati ini, terasa berbunga bunga
Jemputlah malam nanti, ajaklah teman temanmu
Datang beraya rumah ku,bersama ayah dan ibu

(Chorus)
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna
Raya mari kita semua bergembira,
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa
Raya inikan hari raya yang bermakna (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita semua bergembira, (Yayaya)
Raya mari kita menghiburkan jiwa, (Yayaya)
Raya lupakanlah segala sengketa

(Outro)
Dengan teman,ibu bapa sanak saudara
Minta ampun kemaafan sesama kita
Selamat Hari Raya

#YeyeRaya #Floor88 #Odda #LaguRaya2026

snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: Léa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra
2D Effects Artist: Ina Choi

'Arirang' Composer & Piano: Goldbranch
Sound Designer: Jang Mi Ra

snippet.title: PRX vs. G2 — VALORANT Masters Santiago — Playoffs Stage
snippet.description:
From February 28th to March 15th, the world’s top VALORANT teams will battle at Masters Santiago, the first global event of the 2026 VALORANT Champions Tour. Twelve teams qualified through Stage 1 tournaments of their respective regional leagues, will compete for Championship Points and a chance to advance toward Champions Shanghai.

We’re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: AWS, Coinbase, EWC, Globant, HyperX, Mastercard, OMEN, Red Bull, Secretlab, and Verizon.

Make sure to follow the official VALORANT Esports social channels for additional information:

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Daiyan Trisha - Jom Raya feat. Amir Ahnaf (Live Version)
snippet.description:
Shot at the beautiful Butterfly Florist, this is the stripped live version of Daiyan Trisha's iconic 2025 raya song "Jom Raya'" but this time, it's featuring the one and only, Amir Ahnaf. Produced and supported by the incredibly talented SOG twins, Raja Nazrin Shah and Raja Nazmin Shah, we hope this acoustic track relives your favourite raya song, Jom Raya!

Lyrics - Inikan Hari Raya

[Verse 1]
Bila hari raya,
Janganlah tamak haloba,
Dalam bergembira,
Biarlah berpada.

[Pre-chorus]
Oh tak kesah,
Baju lama,
Asalkan masih boleh beraya,
Bersyukur sentiasa.

[Chorus]
Salam lebaran pada semua,
Dengan senyuman dan juga tawa,
Meriahkan suasana,
Inikan hari raya.

Raikan dengan sanak saudara,
Yang berkunjung datang tak dilupa,
Penuh riang gembira,
Indahnya hari raya.

[Verse 2]
Oh sudah tiba,
Hari yang dinanti,
Confirm riuh semua kumpul sekali.

Makcik yang belah sana,
Sepupu yang belah sini,
Pak long pak ngah pun ada,
Eh memang kecoh sekali.

Beraya hujung ke hujung kampung,
Semua rumah kalau boleh memang nak dikunjung,
Yang tampan dan segak datang berbaju melayu,
Yang cantik pula berbaju kurung.

Inikan hari raya.

Raikan dengan sanak saudara,
Yang berkunjung datang tak dilupa,
Penuh riang gembira,
Indahnya hari raya.

[Chorus]
Salam lebaran pada semua,
Dengan senyuman dan juga tawa,
Meriahkan suasana,
Inikan hari raya.

Raikan dengan sanak saudara,
Yang berkunjung datang tak dilupa,
Penuh riang gembira,
Indahnya hari raya.

Hari raya,
Ooh,
Indahnya hari raya.

snippet.title: [CC SUB] Official Trailer - The Water นทีร้อยเล่ห์ | บ้านวาทินวณิช 4 Elements
snippet.description:
ท่ามกลางกระแสธารที่เชี่ยวกรากของโลกธุรกิจ "ความภักดี" ถูกใช้เป็นเครื่องมือชิ้นสุดท้ายในการทำลายคู่แข่ง เมื่อ 'ชลลดา' หญิงสาวผู้รับคำสั่งจากครอบครัว ต้องแทรกซึมเข้าไปในโรงแรมของ 'อาโป' ผู้บริหารสาวนิ่งลึกที่ขึ้นชื่อว่าเดาใจยากที่สุด เพื่อล้วงความลับ อำนาจและความโลภกำลังจะเปลี่ยนโชคชะตาของเธอทั้งคู่ไปตลอดกาล

⏳เมื่อความลับที่ต้องล้วง กลายเป็นเงื่อนไขบีบบังคับหัวใจ 💞 เมื่อความใกล้ชิดถูกใช้เป็นเครื่องมือเข้าหาเป้าหมายที่ดูอันตรายกว่าที่คิด และเมื่อ "แผนลวง" ที่ต้องทำให้แนบเนียน กลับกลายเป็นความรู้สึกที่เกิดขึ้นจริง

ภารกิจที่เริ่มจากผลประโยชน์ แต่ต้องเดิมพันด้วยหัวใจของคนสองคน
เล่ห์กลที่เดิมพันด้วยความแค้น กำลังจะกลายเป็นสายใยรักที่นิรันดร์ 

น้ำนิ่งไหลลึก ยิ่งถลำลึกลงไป ยิ่งอันตรายเกินกว่าจะถอนตัว 🌊

Amidst the raging currents of the corporate world, "loyalty" is used as the ultimate weapon to destroy rivals. When 'Chonlada', acting on strict orders from her family, must infiltrate the hotel of 'Apo' a deeply reserved female executive known for being impossibly hard to read to uncover her secrets, power and greed are about to change both of their destinies forever. 

⏳When the secrets she must steal become the very chains that bind her heart 💞 When intimacy is used as a tool to approach a target far more dangerous than expected And when a flawless "deception" turns into genuine feelings.

A mission born from self-interest must now be gambled with the hearts of two people. A vengeful scheme is about to blossom into an eternal bond of love.
Still waters run deep. 

The deeper she dives, the more impossible it becomes to escape. 🌊

Amidst the raging currents of the corporate world, "loyalty" is used as the ultimate weapon to destroy rivals. When 'Chonlada', acting on strict orders from her family, must infiltrate the hotel of 'Apo' a deeply reserved female executive known for being impossibly hard to read to uncover her secrets, power and greed are about to change both of their destinies forever. 

⏳When the secrets she must steal become the very chains that bind her heart 💞 When intimacy is used as a tool to approach a target far more dangerous than expected And when a flawless "deception" turns into genuine feelings.

A mission born from self-interest must now be gambled with the hearts of two people. A vengeful scheme is about to blossom into an eternal bond of love.
Still waters run deep. 

The deeper she dives, the more impossible it becomes to escape. 🌊

snippet.title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
For just the chance to win your heart
You could set the bar beyond the stars
I'll do anything, anything you ask me to

[Pre-Chorus]
Say you want the moon
Watch me learn to fly
Ain't no mountain you could point to
I wouldn't climb

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

[Verse 2]
To hold your hand and call you mine
I'm tryna be your man 'til the end of time
Oh, I'll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through a fire
Just to be by your side
If your heart's on the line
You could take mine

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

[Bridge]
I would swim across the sea just to show you
Sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on
To prove that you belong here in my arms

[Pre-Chorus]
Say you want the moon
Watch me learn to fly
Ain't no mountain you could point to
I wouldn't climb

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you
